channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Democratic socialist wins Colorado primary; Bennet drops governor bid
item.description: Democrats chose a candidate to challenge a Republican House member and selected the state attorney general as a top governor contender.

item.title: Five summer safety tips to avoid emergency room visits
item.description: Experts advise on preventing common summer hazards like drowning, fires, and heat exhaustion.

item.title: Florida takes steps to prevent drowning among children with autism
item.description: Children with autism are 160 times more likely to drown. Florida funds a program focused on swim lessons for them.

item.title: Banksy's flag man in London serves as a warning cry
item.description: As the figure marches, his flag blows back into his face, blinding him to the dangerous step ahead. Typical of Banksy's work, the...
